---
title: "Setup: Verify API documentation and endpoints"
labels: setup, required
---

**Project setup — required.**

This issue tracks verifying the local API documentation and key endpoints.

### Tasks
- [ ] Open `http://localhost:8080/swagger-ui.html`.
- [ ] Confirm the OpenAPI spec loads from `/openapi.yaml`.
- [ ] Confirm endpoints like `/categories`, `/products`, and `/cart` are visible.

### Done when
- Swagger/OpenAPI documentation loads and key endpoints are accessible.
